Post.title: Blog Post
Post.description: Represents an individual blog post written by the personal author.

title.description: The visual title of the blog post.

content.description: The full body content of the blog post in Markdown format.

excerpt.description: A short summary of the blog post for listings.

published.description: Indicates whether the post is visible to any visitor or is a draft.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the post was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the post was last updated.

tags.description: List of keyword tags associated with the post.

readTime.description: An estimated reading duration, for example: '5 min read'.

authorEmail.description: The verified email of the single user writing this blog. Always 'saravanandhesingu1992@gmail.com'.

views.description: The cumulative number of views this post has received.
